news.text: 2026-01-25: NAMO Outerwatch Aaron I refuses to allow the addition of religious divisions in NAMO. He believes it is just going to divide the community and is practically pointless.

2026-01-25: L'Kristinburg supports Jeremyia's opinion, stating that there should be no division by religion in NAMO, because it is pointless. The King gives the example of religious diversity in L'Kristinburg and believes that such a thing can divide not only NAMO, but also the citizens of L'Kristinburg.
2026-01-25: NAMO will have religious divisions and micronations can be in more than one.
2026-01-24: The Republic of Jeremyia declares opposition to religious divisions in NAMO, calling it 'disunifying'.
2026-01-24: Secretary-General Moushanfou announces that NAMO will have religious divisions, with each nation in one or more religious division (depends).
2026-01-23: Mass production of the K9 weapon (a weapon created by L'Kristinburg engineers that shoots rubber bands) begins in L'Kristinburg. This will lead to strong militarization.
2026-01-23: Moushanfou's first act as Secretary General is to commission a redesign of the NAMO flag.

2026-01-22: There is a cultural boom in L'Kristinburg. Monuments are being erected, literature is developing, and the king, together with the ruler of Glynitania, has created the first alphabet for L'Kristinburg. They are currently working on creating a language for L'Kristinburg. There is also a great boom in science and mathematics.
2026-01-16: Unified People's States opening ceremonies for New Tokyo and New Hong Kong 2026 and UPS 2026 take place.
2026-01-15: Central Mercian-Emesaremian War ends after UPS peace proposal accepted in principal.
2026-01-13: NAMO election date moved back to the 21st of January so you can still apply here: https://forms.office.com/e/t8e7rrHkU0
